title: The Tea Party Opens
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Big Mom, Sanji, Pudding as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Now, then! Friends and guests!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Our main event!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The 35th daughter of the Charlotte family! Charlotte pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the third son of the Vin- smoke family! Vinsmoke Sanji! Let their royal wedding

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Begin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Ohh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The pirate crew of the yonkou big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and the "armies of evil" of the germa 66!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Beauti- FUL...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This young couple

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: will connect the dreams of these two das- tardy families together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hehe ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A marriage de raison!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: As these two are united as one,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once again will the flowers of Villany Bloom wildly across the land!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Applaud!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Applaud the dizzying beauty of this day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ceremony starts! There's no going back now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Applaud!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: The Blood- Drenched Wedding begins... now!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 20 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
